extraction_reasoning: The litigation disclosures show 7 tax proceedings against the Company (3 direct-tax and 4 indirect-tax cases, total ₹7.16 million), 3 criminal proceedings against the Directors, and 1 direct-tax proceeding against the Promoters; there are no disclosed statutory/regulatory enforcement proceedings and no “By” rows to count. For the aggregate amount against the Company and its subsidiaries, I counted the Company’s quantified tax amount of ₹7.16 million and excluded the Promoters’ ₹0.1 million matter because it is a personal promoter matter; ₹7.16 million converts to ₹0.716 crore. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated consolidated Total of ₹66.42 million as at December 31, 2018, converted to ₹6.642 crore, rather than a re-sum of line items. The disclosed customer concentration is company-wide and based on consolidated revenue from operations: top 10 customers contributed 44.45% in Fiscal 2018, the most recent full fiscal year shown; no company-wide top-five figure is disclosed. The source currency unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
